character.name: Create a professional 64x64 pixel
character.prompt: Create a professional 64x64 pixel art sprite of a Raft Escapee (The Raft Prison Inmate) from Marvel Comics for a 2D Tower Defense/RPG game. Design an original generic escaped super-prison inmate inspired by The Raft, not a specific Marvel character. Athletic adult male with a rugged, muscular physique, short unkempt dark hair, light stubble, and a hardened, aggressive expression. Wear a worn orange prison jumpsuit with torn sleeves, ripped pant legs, dirt stains, scratches, and visible repair seams. The jumpsuit should be partially unzipped at the chest, revealing a dark gray undershirt. Add broken metallic handcuffs hanging from one wrist, a few loose prison shackles around one ankle, black fingerless gloves, and heavy black prison boots. The clothing should appear damaged from a violent escape while remaining clean and highly readable in pixel art. Place the character in a hostile combat-ready stance with knees slightly bent, shoulders forward, and fists clenched. Use only orange, dark gray, black, metallic silver, natural skin tones, and subtle gray shadows. Professional high-quality pixel art with clean outlines, strong shading, high contrast, crisp silhouette, consistent lighting from the upper left, and excellent readability at small size. Transparent background, centered character, no text, no UI, no logos, no extra characters, no weapons, and no visual effects. The final image must be a single game-ready 64x64 pixel sprite.
